channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 'From 16 hours to under 5 minutes': How Gen AI is turning fraud into a $400B+ global industry — and experts warn that it’s just the beginning
item.description: Fraud has scaled into an organized system driven by AI speed, complex deception methods, and limited response windows for institutions worldwide.

item.title: Sony temporarily suspends memory card sales due to shortages
item.description: Sony has announced that as of March 27th, 2026, the company is no longer accepting orders for nearly all the products in its CFexpress and SD memory card lines. The list of affected memory products includes CFexpress Type A, Type B, and SDXC/SDHC cards, although a few models of Type B and low-end SF-UZ series […]

item.title: Verizon waives late fees for federal workers affected by partial DHS shutdown
item.description: Verizon will waive late fees and offer flexible payment arrangements for workers affected by the partial government shutdown. The carrier has made similar offers in the past, like during the COVID-19 pandemic when it gave customers extra mobile data at no additional cost. The Department of Homeland Security has been hit the hardest by the partial shutdown, but Verizon's offer covers any federal worker who's able to offer employment verification. Verizon says employees can call 1-800-Verizon (1-800-922-0204) to get their late fees waived and set up a payment plan.The partial government shutdown...

item.title: The best gaming deals in the Amazon Big Spring Sale: Shop PS5, Xbox, and Nintendo Switch
item.description: Shop gaming deals live Amazon's Big Spring Sale, including gaming monitors and video games for PS5, Xbox, Nintendo Switch.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Saturday, March 28 (game #1524)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Saturday, March 28 (game #755)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Saturday, March 28 (game #1021)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: AI Research Is Getting Harder to Separate From Geopolitics
item.description: A policy change announced by NeurIPS, the world’s leading AI research conference, drew widespread backlash from Chinese researchers this week and then was quickly reversed.

item.title: Why SoftBank’s new $40B loan points to a 2026 OpenAI IPO
item.description: Wall Street giants JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs are extending a 12-month, unsecured loan to the Japanese conglomerate.
